title: Jack Henry Named to Newsweek's America's Greatest Workplaces 2024 for Diversity
text: Award recognizes Jack Henry's impact and commitment to a diverse, inclusive culture MONETT, Mo. , Dec. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ announced today its recognition as one of America's Greatest Workplaces for Diversity 2024 by Newsweek and Plant-A Insights Group.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Up 10.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Jack Henry Recognized on Newsweek's America's Most Responsible Companies 2024 List
text: MONETT, Mo. , Dec. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) was named as one of America's most responsible companies by Newsweek.
